title: FPS X PVP
description: A lightweight Fabric PvP modpack focused on maximum FPS, low latency, smoother gameplay, and competitive combat. Perfect for BedWars, Lifesteal, Crystal PvP, and SMP servers. 🚀⚔️
body:
# **FPS X PvP**

**The ultimate Minecraft PvP and performance modpack built for competitive players.
**
FPS X PvP combines the best optimization, visual enhancements, and PvP-focused quality-of-life mods into one lightweight package. Whether you're grinding BedWars, practicing on Crystal PvP servers, playing Lifesteal SMPs, or competing in tournaments, this modpack is designed to deliver maximum FPS, lower input delay, smoother gameplay, and a cleaner combat experience.

**Features**
- ⚡ Massive FPS Boosts
- 🎯 PvP-Focused HUD & Crosshair Improvements
- 📉 Reduced Lag & Stutters
- 🔥 Low Resource Usage
- 🛡️ Armor, Totem & Combat Utilities
- ✨ Better Visual Effects Without Sacrificing Performance
- 🌎 Multiplayer & Server Friendly
- 🖥️ Optimized for Low-End and High-End PCs

**Included Categories**
- Performance Optimization
- PvP Enhancements
- HUD Improvements
- Quality of Life Tweaks
- Visual Improvements
- Multiplayer Utilities
  
**Perfect For**
- BedWars
- SkyWars
- Lifesteal SMP
- Crystal PvP
- KitPvP
- Survival Multiplayer
- Competitive Minecraft
  
**Goal:
Maximum FPS. Minimum Lag. Better PvP.**

Built for Minecraft 1.21.x Fabric players who want a clean, fast, and competitive experience without unnecessary bloat. 🚀
